name: io.github.netadvanced/vikunja-mcp-ng
description: Model Context Protocol server for Vikunja task management

environment_variables.description: Base URL of your Vikunja instance's API (e.g. https://vikunja.example.com/api/v1)
environment_variables.name: VIKUNJA_URL

environment_variables.description: Vikunja API token (tk_...) or JWT (eyJ...) for authentication. See VIKUNJA_API_TOKEN_FILE for the Docker-secrets variant.
environment_variables.name: VIKUNJA_API_TOKEN
